description: Offline stabilize win for ?demo=1 / Beat 3. Pair with seeded published simulation 'The Convention Reversed' (chaos ~88). Person B: on demo, apply demoSelectedChoiceIds and return result block.

correctiveChoices.title: Restore the Magul Maduwa treaty text
correctiveChoices.description: Reintroduce the original 1815 convention wording as the legal baseline, reducing diplomatic ambiguity.

correctiveChoices.title: Reinstate exiled Kandyan nobles
correctiveChoices.description: Bring moderating chiefs back into court politics to counter radical anti-British factions.

correctiveChoices.title: Negotiate a protected monarchy clause
correctiveChoices.description: Trade limited British oversight for a crowned head and stable succession law.

correctiveChoices.title: Demobilize rebel militias in the hills
correctiveChoices.description: Disarm irregular bands that keep raiding plantations and inflaming chaos scores.

correctiveChoices.title: Open Colombo trade councils
correctiveChoices.description: Channel economic grievances into scheduled assemblies instead of sporadic uprisings.

eventsPatch.title: Noble mediation at Kandy
eventsPatch.description: Returned chiefs broker a ceasefire between the crown and British residents, pausing open rebellion.

eventsPatch.title: Hill country disarmament
eventsPatch.description: Registered militias lay down arms in exchange for land guarantees, lowering raids on low-country estates.
